title: coaching — trait composition
description: Four owned traits — one anchor + three composition helpers. Anchor: BelongsToCoachingProfile for downstream models with a coaching_profile_id FK. Helpers: HasCoachAssignments / HasCoachCertifications / HasCoachSkillRatings compose the reverse relations onto CoachingProfile itself.

owned.description: Mixed into any downstream model that carries a `coaching_profile_id` FK. Adds the `coachingProfile()` belongsTo relation + a `resolveInCoachingProfile(?CoachingProfile)` query scope + a `booted()` hook that refuses to save when coachingProfile.tenant_id != row.tenant_id (cross-tenant defense-in-depth).
usedBy: sports/attendance::AttendanceCheckIn (Wave 4+ — session check-in references the coach who authorised)

owned.description: Composed onto CoachingProfile. Adds `assignments()` (hasMany CoachAssignment), `activeAssignments()` (filtered), `headCoachAssignments()`, `assistantAssignments()`. Read-only accessors.

staff.reason: CoachingProfile carries staff_id — cascades tenant + branch through the parent Staff.

branch.reason: CoachingProfile.branch_id direct — cascades organization + region + tenant through the branch.

user.reason: CoachSkillRating carries rated_by_user_id; CoachCertification carries verified_by_admin_user_id; CoachAssignment carries assigned_by_user_id — enables audit-trail joins.

audit.reason: Every state mutation (verification, deactivation, rating value change, certification verify) is compliance-relevant.

coachingProfile.notes: Order matters. BelongsToTenant precedes every scope-observing trait. BelongsToStaff precedes BelongsToBranch (Staff resolves the tenant + user chain first). The three Has* helpers compose reverse relations; no observer overlap.
